items.name: Windows-DLL-Injector
items.description: 💉 A Windows dynamic-link library injection tool written in C++20. It can inject a dynamic-link library into a running process by its window title or create a new process with an injection.（使用C++20开发的Windows动态链接库注入工具，可以通过窗口标题注入运行中的进程，或在创建新进程时注入。）
